hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; if echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.swift$'; then swiftformat --quiet "$f" 2>/dev/null; fi; } || true
echo '{"systemMessage": "SESSION END: 1) Run ./scripts/check.sh — ensure lint, format, build, tests pass. 2) Review code quality before committing. 3) Commit if all green."}'
